items.requirement_note:
Earning this reward is simple. You only need to link your IOI Account to your Twitch account and then watch a cumulative 1 hour of HITMAN World of Assassination on Twitch during the drop campaign duration.

How to get these drops

  1. Link your HITMAN World of Assassination account to Twitch — Connect your account ↗, or via Twitch Settings → Connections. One-time setup.
  2. Watch an eligible stream — Watch any HITMAN World of Assassination stream on Twitch ↗ that shows the Drops Enabled tag. Progress fills automatically while you watch. Make sure you're logged into Twitch.
  3. Claim your drop — When the progress bar fills, a notification appears in chat. Click it, or go to twitch.tv/drops/inventory ↗ to claim. You have ~24 hours before it expires.
  4. Receive in-game — Rewards appear in your HITMAN World of Assassination account within a few minutes. Restart the game if they don't show up.
Troubleshooting & FAQ →

Frequently Asked Questions

What HITMAN World of Assassination Twitch Drops are available?

HITMAN World of Assassination has 1 Twitch Drop reward: The Bowtie Duck. Active campaigns end June 28, 2026.

How do I get HITMAN World of Assassination Twitch Drops?

To earn HITMAN World of Assassination Twitch Drops: link your Twitch account to your HITMAN World of Assassination game account, watch an eligible stream for the required time, then claim your drops at twitch.tv/drops/inventory. Drops expire if unclaimed after the campaign ends.

When do the HITMAN World of Assassination Twitch Drop campaigns end?

The current HITMAN World of Assassination Twitch Drop campaigns end on June 28, 2026. Watch and claim before then — unclaimed drops expire with the campaign.

Which channels should I watch for HITMAN World of Assassination Twitch Drops?

Watch any Twitch channel streaming HITMAN World of Assassination while the campaign is active.

Streamer Tools

Chatbot Command

Add a !drops command to Nightbot or StreamElements:

$(urlfetch https://twitchdrops.app/api/chatbot/hitman-world-of-assassination)

Preview — or copy directly as a static command:

Drops for HITMAN World of Assassination: 1 reward — The Bowtie Duck (1h). Ends Jun 28. Claim: twitch.tv/drops/inventory | Details: twitchdrops.app/game/hitman-world-of-assassination
